_comment: CUSTOMIZE: Copy this file to config.local.json and review every field below.

prometheus._comment_url: CUSTOMIZE: Set the full Prometheus /api/v1/targets endpoint.
prometheus._comment_timeout: CUSTOMIZE: Set the request timeout in seconds.
prometheus._comment_ca: CUSTOMIZE: For a private HTTPS CA, set its local PEM path. Otherwise leave this empty.
prometheus._comment_bearer: CUSTOMIZE: Set only the environment-variable name that holds a bearer token. Never put the token here.
prometheus._comment_basic_user: CUSTOMIZE: Set the basic-auth username, or leave it empty when basic auth is disabled.
prometheus._comment_basic_password: CUSTOMIZE: Set only the environment-variable name that holds the basic-auth password.

expectations._comment_targets: CUSTOMIZE: Replace this list with every job and scrape URL that should exist exactly once.
expectations._comment_forbidden: CUSTOMIZE: List stale addresses, retired names, or other substrings that must not appear in a scrape URL.
expectations._comment_health: CUSTOMIZE: Set the only accepted Prometheus health value.
